message:
chore(beads): track perf optimization task and fix Next.js type route path

Add in-progress issue for isomorphic website performance optimization
pass. The next-env.d.ts path update from `.next/dev/types/routes.d.ts`
to `.next/types/routes.d.ts` reflects the canonical route generated by
the current Next.js version — keeps TypeScript resolution aligned with
the actual build output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
